9:40 A.M. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED IN CHAMBERS BEFORE TRIAL. STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE COURT RECORD; KIM REIFEIN, REPORTER. ERIC LABOWITZ, VISITING JUDGE. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS OF THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAGLEY, JANICE CASTILLO, MODESTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 235 EDDY STREET ROOM #55 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-09-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO MONEY JUDGMENT IF BOTH DEFTS. VACATE BY 9/5/96. IF NOT, PLTF TO APPLY TO COURT FOR AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT TOGETHER WITH DECLARATION PROVING DEFAULT IN THE TERMS AND CONDITONS OF THE JUDGMENT HEREIN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAGLEY, JANICE CASTILLO, MODESTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 235 EDDY STREET ROOM #55 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-05-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO MONEY JUDGMENT IF BOTH DEFTS. VACATE BY 9/5/96. IF NOT, PLTF TO APPLY TO COURT FOR AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT TOGETHER WITH DECLARATION PROVING DEFAULT IN THE TERMS AND CONDITONS OF THE JUDGMENT HEREIN.
